app.title: Sarma
chat.input.placeholder: Type a message... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline)
main.placeholder.files: Files page placeholder. Text/hex viewers will land here.
main.dialog.stop_gateway.title: Stop Gateway
settings.title: Settings
settings.save_hint: Save writes the IDE database and immediately syncs the IDA-MCP config.conf shown below. Install/reinstall writes that stored config into the IDA plugin directory again.
settings.group.appearance.desc: Customize the look and feel of the application.
settings.field.theme_mode.desc: Choose between light and dark color schemes. The change takes effect immediately.
settings.group.global_paths.desc: IDE settings are stored in the application data directory. IDA-MCP runtime settings sync to the config.conf shown below; when a plugin directory is configured, that target is ida_mcp/config.conf under the IDA plugins directory.
settings.group.runtime.desc: IDE-side preferences used by this application only.
settings.group.transport.desc: Network and safety switches stored in the IDE database and synced to IDA-MCP config.conf.
settings.group.execution.desc: Execution paths stored in the IDE database and synced to IDA-MCP config.conf for launching IDA and Python helpers.
settings.group.wsl.desc: Settings used only when the control side runs in WSL and IDA stays on the Windows host.
settings.group.environment.desc: Read-only runtime environment variables that can override parts of ida_mcp config.conf.
settings.field.language.desc: UI language for Settings and related prompts. Re-renders this page after switching.
settings.field.ida_dir.desc: IDA installation directory. Plugin dir is auto-derived as <ida_dir>/plugins.
settings.field.plugin_dir.desc: IDA global plugins directory (auto-derived) where ida_mcp files are installed.
settings.field.ida_mcp_config_path.desc: Target file written when settings are saved. The IDA plugin reads this file at runtime; install/reinstall also rewrites it from the IDE database.
settings.detect.ida_dir_empty: Please select an IDA installation directory first.
settings.field.ide_request_timeout.desc: HTTP request timeout (seconds) used by the IDE when calling the gateway.
settings.field.enable_http.desc: Enable the HTTP transport for MCP communication.
settings.field.enable_stdio.desc: Enable the stdio transport for MCP communication.
settings.field.enable_unsafe.desc: Allow unsafe tools (py_eval, debugger controls, patch_bytes, etc.). Disabled by default.
settings.field.http_host.desc: Host address the HTTP gateway binds to.
settings.field.http_port.desc: Port the HTTP gateway listens on.
settings.field.http_path.desc: URL path for MCP over HTTP (e.g. /mcp).
settings.field.gateway_token.desc: Optional bearer token required for non-loopback gateway access. Leave empty for local-only use.
settings.field.debug.desc: Enable verbose debug logging in the gateway.
settings.field.ida_executable.desc: Path to ida64.exe / idat64.exe used by open_in_ida.
settings.field.ida_default_port.desc: Default MCP port assigned to each IDA instance.
settings.field.ida_host.desc: Host address IDA instances connect to.
settings.field.ida_request_timeout.desc: Request timeout (seconds) for IDA instance MCP servers.
settings.field.wsl_path_bridge.desc: Enable WSL-to-Windows path translation for open_in_ida.
settings.field.open_in_ida_bundle_dir.de: Optional staging directory used before opening files in IDA. Only used when WSL path bridge is enabled.
settings.field.open_in_ida_autonomous.de: Controls whether open_in_ida launches IDA with -A by default.
settings.field.auto_start.desc: Automatically start the IDA instance MCP server when the plugin loads.
settings.field.server_name.desc: FastMCP server name exposed to clients.
settings.field.ida_python_effective.desc: IDA Python is the default Python used by both IDE and Gateway unless you explicitly override them below.
settings.install.inputs.desc: Read-only values used by Install and Check. Change them in Config first if needed.
settings.install.placeholder: Install and repair results will appear here.
settings.install.requirements.desc: Dependencies from ida_mcp requirements.txt and whether the selected Python already has them.
settings.install.requirements_path.desc: The ida_mcp dependency list used by install and check.
settings.install.environment.desc: Runtime environment variables detected in the current process.
settings.diaphora.title: Diaphora
settings.diaphora.desc: Binary diffing plugin for IDA Pro. Copies diaphora_plugin.py and diaphora_plugin.cfg into the IDA plugins directory.
settings.upgrade.placeholder: Upgrade is still a placeholder. Future work can add version detection, diff preview, and guided upgrades.
settings.group.model_providers.desc: Add and configure LLM model providers for the chat agent.
settings.field.model_name.desc: Display name for this provider entry.
settings.field.model_base_url.desc: API endpoint URL. Leave empty for the provider default.
settings.field.model_api_key.desc: API key for authentication. Leave empty for local models.
settings.field.model_api_mode.desc: Protocol used by the API endpoint.
settings.field.model_temperature.desc: Sampling temperature. Lower values produce more deterministic output.
settings.field.model_context.desc: Maximum context window for this model. Supports K/M suffixes (e.g. 200K, 1M). 0 disables automatic compaction.
settings.model.empty: No model providers configured. Click "Add Model" to add one.
settings.group.mcp_servers.desc: Manage MCP server connections used by the chat agent.
settings.field.mcp_server_name.desc: Unique name used as the MCP server key.
settings.field.mcp_server_url.desc: HTTP or SSE endpoint of the MCP server.
settings.field.mcp_transport.desc: Connection protocol: stdio runs a local command; http and sse connect to a remote endpoint.
settings.field.mcp_command.desc: Executable to run (stdio only). E.g. python
settings.field.mcp_args.desc: Command arguments, one per line (stdio only).
settings.field.mcp_env.desc: Environment variables, one KEY=VALUE per line (stdio only).
settings.field.mcp_cwd.desc: Working directory for the subprocess (stdio only).
settings.field.mcp_headers.desc: HTTP headers, one KEY: VALUE per line (http / sse only).
settings.field.mcp_timeout.desc: HTTP request timeout in seconds (http / sse only).
settings.mcp.detail.title: {name} — Server Details
settings.group.skills_registry.desc: Import skill packages and manage skills available to the chat agent.
settings.skills.empty: No skills imported yet. Click "Import" to add a skill zip package.
settings.skills.name: Skill
settings.skills.enable_skills.desc: When enabled, the agent loads all active skills from the skills directory.
settings.skills.remove_confirm: Remove skill "{name}" and delete its files?
settings.skills.prompt_template.desc: Appended to the base system prompt when this skill is active.
chat.error.no_provider: Error: No model provider configured. Add and enable a model in Settings first.
chat.session.title: Conversations
chat.trace.title: Tool Calls
